title: EmbeddedContentWireframe
description: Schema of all properties of an EmbeddedContentWireframe.

slotId.description: Unique Id of the slot containing this embedded content.

isVisible.description: Whether this embedded content is visible or not.

permanentId.description: A globally unique and stable identifier for this UI element, computed as the hash of the element's path. Used to correlate wireframes with RUM action events.
